text:
**1. Per-project wiki — this is the real carry-forward.**
Capture distills each session's transcript into interlinked topic guides at `~/.proactive-context/projects/<path>/wiki/`, and `inject` reads that wiki on every prompt (`inject.rs:354` → `wiki::wiki_dir(&proj_dir)`). This works and compounds — but it's scoped to one codebase. It won't surface in another project. [...] **2. Global / "how the user thinks" — detected, queued, then abandoned.**
The capture prompt *does* explicitly classify scope (`capture.rs:326`): *"scope 'global' only for universal user preferences across ALL projects."* So the distillation step recognizes cross-project, user-level lessons. But look at where they go:
